message:
fix(pthread): add FORCE_NATIVE_THREADING flag to bypass host delegation in thread lifecycle tests

Same pattern as FORCE_NATIVE_MUTEX (dde7106): thread lifecycle operations
(create/join/detach/self/equal) delegate to glibc via dlvsym(RTLD_NEXT) when
not running under LD_PRELOAD. This caused pthread_detach_makes_subsequent_join_fail_with_esrch
to get EINVAL(22) from glibc instead of ESRCH(3) from the native implementation,
poisoning the test mutex and cascading to 3 other test failures.

The fix adds FORCE_NATIVE_THREADING AtomicBool checked by all 5 native_pthread_*
functions, and a lock_and_force_native() helper in the test file that sets the
flag before each test. All 5 thread lifecycle tests and 4 mutex tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
